# `pipeline show` renders the stage-prerequisite chain explicitly by default —
# two independent agents this session hit an unanticipated (but correct)
# rejection because ordering was only inferable from HCL declaration order.
# --json is unchanged (still the raw wire.Pipeline), plain-text is the new
# human-readable default.
env BREEZE_DIR=$WORK/state

exec breeze identity register admin
cp stdout admin.token
exec breeze apply -f pipeline.hcl --as admin --token-file admin.token

exec breeze pipeline show release
stdout 'fan-out at: deploy \(environments: \[staging prod\]\)'
stdout 'build\s+command\s+requires: \(none, first stage\)'
stdout 'review\s+approval\s+requires: build'
stdout 'deploy\s+deploy\s+requires: review'
stdout 'env deps: prod requires staging'
stdout 'test\s+command\s+requires: deploy \(same environment\)'
stdout 'hotfix\s+command\s+requires: \(none — debug stage, skips ordering\)'

# --json is untouched: still the raw wire.Pipeline, no "requires" field grafted on.
exec breeze pipeline show release --json
stdout '"name":\s*"release"'
! stdout 'requires'

exec breeze stop

-- pipeline.hcl --
pipeline "release" {
  environments = ["staging", "prod"]
  environment_deps {
    prod = ["staging"]
  }

  stage "build" {
    type    = "command"
    timeout = "10s"
    command = ["/bin/true"]
  }
  stage "review" {
    type               = "approval"
    required_approvals = 1
    approver_role      = "reviewer"
  }
  stage "deploy" {
    type     = "deploy"
    fans_out = true
    timeout  = "5m"
    command  = ["/bin/true"]
  }
  stage "test" {
    type    = "command"
    timeout = "3m"
    command = ["/bin/true"]
  }
  stage "hotfix" {
    type    = "command"
    debug   = true
    timeout = "1m"
    command = ["/bin/true"]
  }
}
